title: Based Optimization
description: Fps focused modpack. Only for fabric. Made to give you maximum amount of fps.
body:
# Based Optimization for max FPS.
Based Optimization has tons of mods to make your game runs smooth. Mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Nvidium (only for nvidia cards).

# Support most of Optifine features
Such as: Custom textures, Custom models, Custom GUI and many more.

# Has Bugfixes
Mods such as Debugify or Blanket that are used to fix bugs that Mojang themself didn't fix.
